tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.version_description: From a midi file, adapted by me.

recommended.version_description: A No.8 hit in the UK when first released in 1970 (only got to 78 when re-released in 1990) and also a number 8 for Bananarama in 1986 - https://youtu.be/8LhkyyCvUHk.

recommended.song_name: Red Cadillac And A Black Moustache
In Hell Ill Be In Good Company

content:
[Intro]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]                     [ch]Bbm/Ab[/ch]
People in Oakland, Oakland[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
See I'm ridin' higher and higher (woah-ohh)[/tab]
[tab]                                                    [ch]F#9#5/A[/ch]
Kinda broke, so y'all know all I got's five, I got five[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
Player, give me some brew and I might just chill[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
But I'm the type that like to light another joint, like Cypress Hill[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
I steal doobies, spit loogies when I puff on it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]                     [ch]Bbm/Ab[/ch]
I got some bucks on it, but it ain't enough on it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
Go get the S-t. I-d-e-s[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
Nevertheless, I'm hella fresh, rollin' joints like a cigarette[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
So pass it across the table, like ping pong[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]               [ch]F#9#5/A[/ch]
I'm gone, beatin' my chest, like King Kong[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
It's on, wrap my lips around a 40[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
And when it comes to getting another stogie[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
Fools all kick in, like Shinobi[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
No, he ain't my homie to begin with[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]                      [ch]Bbm/Ab[/ch]
It's too many hands to be poppin' up, let my friend hit it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
Unless you pull out the fat-crispy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
Five-dollar bill, on the real, before it's history[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
Cause fools be havin' them vacuum lungs[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]                                        [ch]F#9#5/A[/ch]
And if you let 'em hit it for free, you hella dum-da-dum-dumb[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
I come to school with the Taylor on my earlobe[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
Avoiding all the thick teasers, skeezers, and weirdos[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
That be blowing off the land, like, "Where the bomb at?"[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]                          [ch]Bbm/Ab[/ch]
Give me two bucks, you take a puff, and pass my bong back[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
Suck up the dank like a Slurpee; the serious bomb[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
Will make a niggy go delirious, like Eddie Murphy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
I got more growing pains than Maggie[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]                          [ch]F#9#5/A[/ch]
Cause homies nag me to take the dank out of the baggie[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
I got five on it; grab your 40, let's get keyed[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]                                     [ch]Bbm/Ab[/ch]
I got five on it; messin' with that Indo weed[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
I got five on it; it's got me stuck, can not go back[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]                                        [ch]F#9#5/A[/ch]
I got five on it; partner, let's go half on a sack[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
I take sacks to the face whenever I can[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
Don't need no crutch, I'm so keyed up[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
'Til the joint be burning my hand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
Next time I roll it in a hampa[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]                                [ch]Bbm/Ab[/ch]
To burn slow, so the ashes won't be burning up my hand, bruh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
Hoochies can hit, but they know they got to pitch in[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
Then I roll a joint that's longer than your extension (hahaha)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
Cause I'll be damned if you get high off me for free[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]                         [ch]F#9#5/A[/ch]
Hell no! You better bring your own spliff, chief[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
What's up? Don't babysit that, better pass the joint[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
Stop hitting, cause you know you got asthma[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
Crack a 40 open, homie, and guzzle it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]                              [ch]Bbm/Ab[/ch]
Cause I know the weed in my system is gettin' lonely[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
I gotta take a whiz test to my P-O[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
I know I failed, âcause I done smoked major weed, bro[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
And every time we with Chris, that fool rollin' up a fatty[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F#9#5/A[/ch]
But the Tanqueray straight had me[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
I got five on it; grab your 40, let's get keyed[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]                                     [ch]Bbm/Ab[/ch]
I got five on it; messin' with that Indo weed[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
I got five on it; it's got me stuck, can not go back[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]                                        [ch]F#9#5/A[/ch]
I got five on it; partner, let's go half on a sack[/tab]

[Verse 3: Numskull]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
Hey, make this right, mane, stop at the light, mane[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
My yester-night thing got me hung off the night train[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
You fade, I face, so let's head to the East[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]                             [ch]Bbm/Ab[/ch]
Hit the stroll to 9-0, so we can roll big hashish[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
I wish I could fade the eighth, but I'm low budget[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
Still rollin' a two-door Cutlass, same old bucket[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
Foggy windows, soggy Indo[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F#9#5/A[/ch]
I'm in the 'land getting smoked with my kinfolk[/tab]

[Verse 4: Yukmouth]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
Been smoked, Yuk'll spray ya, lay you down[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
Up in the O-A-K, the Town[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
Homies don't play around, we down to blaze a pound[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]
Then ease up, speed up through the E-S-O[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm9[/ch]             [ch]Bbm/Ab[/ch]
Drink the V-S-O-P up with a lemon squeeze up[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
And everybody's rolled up, I'm the roller[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
That's quick to fold a blunt out of a bunch of sticky doja[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
Hold up, suck up my weed is all you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]                                 [ch]F#9#5/A[/ch]
Kick in feed, cause where I be we need half, like Umfufu[/tab]
